/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib CMakeFiles/chess_ga.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_ga.dir/src/board.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_ga.dir/src/mate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_ga.dir/src/ga.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess_ga.dir/src/html_export.cpp.o -o chess_ga
